import { useParams } from 'react-router-dom'; import "./PostWindow.css" import MAIN from '../Main/Main' import React from 'react' import { getNews } from '../db.js' export default function PostWindow(props) { const { id_post } = useParams() const { title, text, img, id, link, author, tags } = props.list[`num${id_post}`] // const { titleParams, textParams, imgParams, idParams, linkParams, authorParams, tagsParams } = props.list[id_post] return (
{author}
{title}
{text}
{tags}
) }
